candidate: L16 news-sentiment cross-sectional factor scaffold (pre-registered; offline-validated)

snapshot_characterization.gap: snapshot only: a few symbols, ~1 month, headline-only, no per-day historical sentiment scores -> NOT a historical day-stamped panel; needs approved fetch.

top_disclosure_types.type: pay disinda sermaye piyasasi araci islem

summary.headline: News-sentiment harness pre-registered and offline-validated. Synthetic self-test asserts=PASS (recovery NW-t=5.9081, placebo NW-t=0.1755, look-ahead-leak NW-t=13.5291). Real news_cache is a 6-symbol / 60-article LIVE snapshot -- NOT a backtestable historical panel. NO real-data edge claimed.
summary.interpretation: Crystallizes the directive's SENTIMENT avenue into the L11 forward-scaffold form: the test is frozen and pipeline-validated; only a historical day-stamped news/sentiment fetch (the maintainer-gated) is missing. The snapshot is dominated by KAP special-disclosures, so one approved KAP historical-text fetch would feed L16 (sentiment), L17 (NLP-type) and #1 daily-PEAD jointly.

verdict.verdict: SCAFFOLD-SELF-TEST PASS (synthetic-only; no deployable edge; awaiting approved historical news/sentiment fetch)
